what: Fit pH Curve using NLME — fit_pH_curve
title: Fit pH Curve using NLME — fit_pH_curve
text: Fits pharmacodynamic model pH data using nonlinear mixed-effects modeling. `stratify` TRUE, fits separate models group.

title: Fit pH Curve using NLME — fit_pH_curve
code: fit_pH_curve(   data,   model,   amt,   stratify = FALSE,   estmethod = "focei",   dose_time = 5 )

title: Fit pH Curve using NLME — fit_pH_curve
text: data Data frame containing pH data. Must include columns: pH, time, id, group. model rxode2/nlmixr2 model fit. amt Dose amount administer time 0. stratify Logical indicating whether fit separate models group (default FALSE). estmethod Estimation method use (default "focei"). dose_time Time (positive) baseline add time 0 (default 5).

title: Fit pH Curve using NLME — fit_pH_curve
text: nlmixr2 fit object.

title: Fit pH Curve using NLME — fit_pH_curve
text: Omar . Elashkar

what: Calculate AUC Linear to tmin, log after tmin — get_auc_linear_down_log_up
title: Calculate AUC Linear to tmin, log after tmin — get_auc_linear_down_log_up
text: Calculate AUC Linear tmin, log tmin

title: Calculate AUC Linear to tmin, log after tmin — get_auc_linear_down_log_up

what: Integrate Area Under pH Threshold — integratepHArea
title: Integrate Area Under pH Threshold — integratepHArea
text: Calculates area pH curve specified pH threshold using trapezoidal rule. assumes flipped shape

title: Integrate Area Under pH Threshold — integratepHArea
code: integratepHArea(   x,   y,   ph_threshold = 5.4,   time_start = 0,   time_end = 50,   method = "linear",   interpolate = TRUE )

title: Integrate Area Under pH Threshold — integratepHArea
text: x Vector time points. y Vector pH values corresponding time points. ph_threshold pH threshold (default 5.4). time_start Start time integration (default 0). time_end End time integration (default 50).

title: Integrate Area Under pH Threshold — integratepHArea
text: Numeric value representing area pH curve threshold.

title: Integrate Area Under pH Threshold — integratepHArea
text: Omar . Elashkar

what: Get pH Metrics from NLME Fit — pHMetrics_from_fit
title: Get pH Metrics from NLME Fit — pHMetrics_from_fit
text: Get pH Metrics NLME Fit

title: Get pH Metrics from NLME Fit — pHMetrics_from_fit
code: pHMetrics_from_fit(   x,   ph_threshold = 5.4,   time_start = 0,   time_end = 50,   step = 0.1,   dose = 100,   onlymean = TRUE,   plot = FALSE,   stratify_by = "None" )

title: Get pH Metrics from NLME Fit — pHMetrics_from_fit
text: x nlmixr2 fit object. ph_threshold pH threshold calculations (default 5.4). time_start Start time simulation. time_end End time simulation. step Time step simulation. dose Dose amount administer time 0. onlymean Logical indicating whether simulate mean profile (default TRUE). plot Logical indicating whether plot simulated pH profiles (default FALSE). stratify_by Stratification option plotting ("None", "Subject", "Group").

title: Get pH Metrics from NLME Fit — pHMetrics_from_fit
text: data frame containing pH metrics calculated simulated pH profiles.

title: Get pH Metrics from NLME Fit — pHMetrics_from_fit
text: Omar . Elashkar

what: Plot pH vs Time with Threshold — plot_pH_time
title: Plot pH vs Time with Threshold — plot_pH_time
text: Generates plot pH values time different subjects/groups, highlighting specified pH threshold.

title: Plot pH vs Time with Threshold — plot_pH_time
code: plot_pH_time(   res,   ph_threshold = 5.4,   show_id = TRUE,   stratify_by = "None",   showAvg = FALSE )

title: Plot pH vs Time with Threshold — plot_pH_time
text: res Data frame containing pH data. ph_threshold pH threshold highlight plot (default 5.4).

title: Plot pH vs Time with Threshold — plot_pH_time
text: ggplot2 object representing pH vs time plot.

title: Plot pH vs Time with Threshold — plot_pH_time
text: Omar . Elashkar

title: Read pH Data — read_pH
text: Reads pH data CSV Excel file performs basic validation.

title: Read pH Data — read_pH
Read pH Data — read_pH
text: file_path Path data file. baseline Baseline pH value assign subject present data (default 7). baseline_time Time baseline adjust time points (default -5). NULL, adjustment made.

title: Read pH Data — read_pH
text: data frame containing pH data.

title: Read pH Data — read_pH
text: Omar . Elashkar

what: Run direct estimation for pH data — run_direct_estimation
title: Run direct estimation for pH data — run_direct_estimation
text: Runs direct estimation calculations pH data, including minimum pH, time minimum pH, time pH threshold, AUC pH threshold.

title: Run direct estimation for pH data — run_direct_estimation
code: run_direct_estimation(   x,   ph_threshold = 5.4,   time_start = 0,   time_end = 50,   method = "linear" )

title: Run direct estimation for pH data — run_direct_estimation
text: x Data frame containing pH data. ph_threshold pH threshold calculations. time_start Start time area time pH calculation. time_end End time area time pH calculation. method Method AUC calculation ("linear", "log", "linear_down_log_up").

title: Run direct estimation for pH data — run_direct_estimation
text: data frame subject group pH parameters

title: Simulate Oral pH-Time Curve — simulate_steph_curve
text: Simulates oral pH-time curves based given PK-PD model.

title: Simulate Oral pH-Time Curve — simulate_steph_curve
code: simulate_steph_curve(   model,   time = seq(0, 50, by = 0.1),   dose = 100,   baseline_time = -5,   nsub = 1,   baseline = 7,   step = 0.1,   group = "A",   ignoreBSV = TRUE,   ignoreRUV = TRUE )

title: Simulate Oral pH-Time Curve — simulate_steph_curve
text: model rxode2 model object representing PK-PD model. time Vector time points simulation (default seq(0, 50, = 0.1)). dose Dose amount (default 100). baseline_time Time baseline adjust time points (default -5). nsub Number subjects simulate (default 1). baseline Baseline pH value. Default 7. Must either 1 number number subjects. step Time step simulation (default 0.1). group Group identifier subjects (default ""). ignoreBSV Logical indicating whether ignore -subject variability (default TRUE). ignoreRUV Logical indicating whether ignore residual unexplained variability (default TRUE).

title: Simulate Oral pH-Time Curve — simulate_steph_curve
text: data frame containing simulated pH-time data.

title: Simulate Oral pH-Time Curve — simulate_steph_curve
text: Omar . Elashkar

title: Summarize Direct Estimation Results — summary.QuantPH
text: Provides summary statistics direct estimation results.

title: Summarize Direct Estimation Results — summary.QuantPH
Summarize Direct Estimation Results — summary.QuantPH
text: object Data frame containing direct estimation results class 'QuantPH'.

title: Summarize Direct Estimation Results — summary.QuantPH
text: data frame summary statistics AUC, time pH threshold, minimum pH, time minimum pH.

title: Summarize Direct Estimation Results — summary.QuantPH
